Sl. 6. A native born in Ohurdhura YoC}a will be very famous by his
speech, intelligence. valour and character. will be selfiSh, blessed

Sl. 7. A native born in Kemadruma Y09a though born il a Royal family
will have no pleasure through wife, will have no good food. no
famity pleasure. no good dress. no Mends though he may
possess wealth, will suffer due to poverty and will enjoy no
pleasure will beg and suffer without money, will be afflicted
with disease. will always suffer. serve as a menial. will have bad
cflaracter. and will do a job which will make a11 peopfe his enemies.
51. 8. One must determine the results of Anapha Yogas by considering
tile planets in Kendra Rasi to Moon and the strength of the
